name: accounting firms managing 10–20 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10–20 clients, manual tracking of subscriptions causes missed renewals. We automate alerts for upcoming renewals instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking multiple subscription renewals and cancellations for clients.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking multiple subscription renewals and cancellations for clients.
